title: Persist Go host transcript and sessions
description: Add transcript/session persistence to the Go rewrite so host state and runtime state can survive restarts and resume cleanly.

logs.msg: Implemented internal/storage using JSONL (append-only events) and SQLite (per-directory indexing and input history). Integrates with session.Event model.
Updated design to include JSONL events and SQLite indexing. Implementation in internal/storage is complete. Integration with cmd/ion and internal/app is next.
